subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached Us, and We hearkened unto thy call. In the Most Great Prison We beseech from the Ancient Lord that which is meet and seemly [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه ات رسید ندایت را شنیدیم و در سجن اعظم از مالک قدم آنچه مصلحت است از برای
subcodes.subjects: @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @prayer for nearness to God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
